result.status_detail: PII warning rendered with 차단 — W3 config-snapshot regression did NOT regress M365 Copilot warning

notes: check-warning, m365.cloud.microsoft/chat/?auth=2. Dedicated --new-window + hard reload (ctrl+shift+r); confirmed logged-in (user 최장희 + 상업용 데이터 보호 배지, no sign-in prompt). Clipboard verified = prompt (24 chars); composer value verified pre-submit = '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' via DOM snapshot. Submitted via 보내기 button, waited ~120s, re-foregrounded M365 window by title. DOM block warning rendered (list item + button): '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)' contains expected '차단'. Composer cleared post-submit (value=''). W3 = 13 service-config fields collapsed to shared_ptr snapshot (sd->svc->FIELD, ws_envelope_type WS dispatch path). Highest-signal WS dispatch path verified intact. Baseline PASS preserved (#1226 w1w2 + #1177/#1188/#1205 iter5 3-frame).
